content: Flora Updater v1.1.1 is now available! Complete console-based redesign!

embeds.title: Flora Updater v1.1.1 - Console-Based Redesign
embeds.description: A modern console-based updater for Flora Executor with auto-extraction and improved user experience.

fields.name: What's New
fields.value:
- **Console-Based Interface**: Completely redesigned from ImGui to modern console-based UI
- **ASCII Banner**: New FLORA ASCII art banner with proper code page support
- **Menu System**: Interactive menu with directory selection and current directory options
- **Directory Chooser**: Built-in folder browser for custom installation paths
- **Auto-Update Check**: Automatic version checking with Y/N confirmation prompt
- **Color-Coded Logs**: Green for success, red for errors, blue for informational messages
- **Auto-Extraction**: Automatic ZIP extraction after download
- **Organized Installation**: All files placed in 'Flora Executor' subfolder
- **1 Second Delays**: Slower process with 1-second delays for better visibility
- **Config Persistence**: Installation path saved to %appdata%/Flora for future use

fields.name: How to Use
fields.value:
1. Run FloraUpdater.exe
2. Choose directory or use current directory
3. Wait for auto-update check (Y/N prompt)
4. Files auto-extract to 'Flora Executor' folder
5. Flora.exe launches automatically

fields.name: System Requirements
fields.value:
- Windows 10 or later
- tar.exe included (built into Windows 10+)
- Internet connection for downloads

fields.name: Features
fields.value:
- Automatic version checking
- Clean installation in dedicated folder
- Color-coded console output
- Persistent installation path
- Auto-launch after update

fields.name: Detection Status
fields.value:
Flora Executor is currently undetectable
Updated to latest Roblox version
